findings.description: The h2 section 'UI標準3. UI部品 (UI部品カタログ)' contains an h3 heading 'UI部品の表示・挙動を修正したい' plus three large tables totaling well over 2000 characters of plain text, but the knowledge file merges all of this into a single section (s2) without splitting at the h3 boundary.
findings.source_evidence: RST h2: 'UI標準3. UI部品 (UI部品カタログ)' with '----' underline; RST h3: 'UI部品の表示・挙動を修正したい' with '====' underline, followed by three full tables (データ表示部品, 入力フォーム部品, コントロール部品).

findings.description: 'フォーカス移動制御' appears in the first column of the 入力フォーム部品 table in s2 but is absent from s2's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source 入力フォーム部品 table row: '| フォーカス移動制御 | :ref:`base_layout_tag` (**tabIndexOrder** 属性値の解説を参照) | **nablarch-template-base** |'

findings.description: 'フォーカス制御' is listed as a hint for s3 (精査エラー時の開閉可能領域の制御を変更したい) but フォーカス移動制御 content belongs to s2. The s3 source section contains no content about focus control, making this hint misplaced and likely to mislead retrieval.
findings.source_evidence: s3 source (開閉可能領域) covers only nablarch-widget-collapsible and its error-display behavior. フォーカス移動制御 / tabIndexOrder content is exclusively in the UI部品カタログ table under s2.
